greeting: I can help you efficiently manage employee call-ins and absences. Just tell me what you need, and I'll handle all the necessary scheduling, accrual, and payroll updates.

suggestedPrompts.title: Process Sick Call-In
suggestedPrompts.prompt: An employee, John Doe, called in sick for his 8 AM - 4 PM shift on 2024-07-15. Please process this as a sick day.

suggestedPrompts.title: Check Accrual Balances
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What are the current PTO and Sick Leave balances for Sarah Lee (Employee ID: 12345)?

suggestedPrompts.title: Process Unpaid Absence
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Taylor needs an unpaid absence for his shift on 2024-07-16. Please classify it as an Unpaid Leave.

suggestedPrompts.title: Review Open Shifts
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Show me all open shifts for my team for the upcoming week.

suggestedPrompts.title: Explain Call-In Process
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Can you walk me through the steps to process an employee call-in and what information you need?

suggestedPrompts.title: View Recent Absences
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Display a list of all employee absences processed for my department in the last 30 days.
